The Problem

Running a Brokerage
Shouldn't Feel Like This

  • ⚡

    Disconnected systems

    Tools that don't talk to each other create data gaps, errors, and wasted hours reconciling.

  • 💸

    Slow deposits & withdrawals

    Every payment delay erodes client trust and feeds churn directly.

  • 📋

    Manual KYC delays

    Compliance backlogs slow onboarding, losing clients to faster competitors.

  • 👁️

    Poor client visibility

    Without unified data, your team is flying blind on client activity and risk.

  • 🤝

    Weak IB tracking

    Manual partner payouts and opaque performance data stunt your network growth.

The result? Lost clients, slower growth, and operational headaches that compound as you try to scale. Most brokerages hit a ceiling not because of market conditions — but because their infrastructure can't keep up.

The Problem

Why Most Brokers Fail
to Retain Traders

  • 📉

    Beginners lose money and leave

    New traders churn fast without guidance, taking their deposits with them.

  • 🏆

    Top traders generate value — but not revenue

    Your best performers attract attention but you have no way to monetize their edge.

  • 🔗

    No structured investment ecosystem

    Without a way for beginners to follow professionals, there's no network effect binding clients to your platform.

  • 🤝

    IB programs alone aren't enough

    Referral networks bring sign-ups but don't solve the retention and engagement gap.

The result? Low retention, low lifetime value, and slow growth — not because of market conditions, but because your platform doesn't give clients a reason to stay and trade more.

The Solution

Create a Self-Growing
Trading Ecosystem

Copy trading transforms your brokerage into a network-driven growth engine where every participant drives revenue.

🏆

Professionals

Top traders publish strategies and earn from followers.

→
📋

Your Platform

MaxCopy connects both sides and monetizes every trade.

→
👤

Investors

Beginners follow professionals and stay longer.

Every trade becomes engagement + revenue
How It Works

Live in Three Steps

01
🏅

Top Traders Become Masters

Your best-performing traders opt in to share their strategies publicly, creating a marketplace of proven track records.

02
📊

Investors Browse & Subscribe

Investors discover Masters through leaderboards ranked by ROI, drawdown, and win rate — then subscribe in one click.

03
⚡

Trades Copy Instantly

Every trade is replicated in real time across accounts and platforms. Fully automated. Fully scalable.

Fully automated. Fully scalable. Revenue from day one.

Core Features

Everything You Need to Run
a Copy Trading Business

Real-time rankings

Instant trade replication

Sub-second copy execution keeps investor positions aligned with Masters.

Cross-platform copying

Copy trades between MT4, MT5, and cTrader seamlessly — no fragmentation.

👥

Multi-account synchronization

One Master, thousands of followers — all synchronized in real time.

Low latency is critical for copy trading success
🎯

Risk limits per strategy

Investors set maximum exposure per Master to control downside risk.

⏸️

Pause / reverse copy

Instant controls to pause or reverse any copy relationship on demand.

⚙️

6+ allocation methods

Proportional, fixed lot, equity-based, and more — match any investor profile.

Controlled risk = higher retention
💰

Performance fees (high-water mark)

Charge fees only on new profits — fair, transparent, and industry-standard.

🔁

Subscription fees

Monthly recurring revenue from investors subscribing to Master strategies.

📊

Volume-based & management fees

Layer multiple fee models to maximize revenue per trade and per account.

🤝

Profit-sharing models

Split earnings between broker, Master, and partners — fully configurable.

Multiple fee models let brokers scale revenue streams

Public profiles

Follower growth tools

Automated payouts
